info.title: Elevate API
info.description: REST API for Elevate, a planning workspace for engineering teams. Authenticate via JWT bearer tokens (from /api/v1/auth/login) or API keys (X-API-Key header). Use workspace_id to scope all operations.

tags.name: Board
tags.description: Full board state with optional filters

tags.name: Tasks
tags.description: Task CRUD, move, batch operations, archive

tags.name: API Keys
tags.description: Generate and manage API keys for external access

post.description: The raw key value is returned only once at creation time. Viewers cannot create API keys.
Image upload (JPEG/PNG/GIF/WebP), max 5 MB. The response carries the public URL the client should use.

get.description: Streams the attachment bytes. Authenticated via either the standard session/API-key headers, or via a signed `?token=` query parameter (used by `` tags which cannot send headers). Tokens expire after 1 hour and are bound to the requesting user.

429.description: Account temporarily locked due to failed attempts

post.description: Reads the HttpOnly `elevate_refresh` cookie, validates the double-submit CSRF token, rotates the refresh cookie, and returns a new short-lived access JWT.
Revokes the refresh-token family, clears session cookies, and requires the double-submit CSRF token.
Replaces the calling user's avatar. Bytes go to object storage; the user row only keeps a URL pointer (~tens of bytes).

get.description: Public read endpoint so tags can render avatars without an Authorization header. Same posture as Slack / GitHub user-content URLs.
Returns the full board state for a workspace: all tasks, columns, and the column order.
The frontend uses this to render only the buttons that are actually wired up via env vars.

post.summary: Exchange OAuth access token for session cookies
post.description: Accepts the short-lived access JWT from the OAuth callback URL fragment, verifies it, ensures refresh + CSRF cookies are set on the API origin, and returns `{ user, token, csrfToken }` for cross-origin SPAs.

get.description: Redirects the browser to the provider consent screen. Pass `?redirect=/some/path` to come back to a specific frontend route after success.
Provider redirects here after consent. We exchange the code, mint a JWT, and bounce back to the frontend.

post.description: Call every 30 seconds to mark the user as active in a workspace.

get.description: Returns users seen in the last 60 seconds.
Returns ok=true when the API is up.

post.summary: Purge archived tasks older than 30 days

post.description: Adds the calling user as a watcher. Idempotent.

delete.description: Removes the calling user from watchers. Idempotent.

post.description: Returns the signing secret only once at creation time.
Replaces the workspace logo. Max 2 MB. Owner / admin only.

get.description: Public so `` tags can render without auth headers. URL changes when the logo is replaced, so a 1-week immutable cache is safe.

post.description: Replaces the board background image. Max 5 MB. Owner / admin only. Set the workspace `background` field directly to clear the image or use a CSS color instead.

get.description: Public so `` tags can render without auth headers. URL changes when replaced, so a 1-week immutable cache is safe.
List all workspaces the authenticated user is a member of.

409.description: Already a member or invite already pending

get.summary: List pending workspace invites for current user

delete.description: Owners and admins may remove other members. Any member may remove themselves (leave). The owner cannot be removed without transferring ownership first.

patch.description: Owners may set member/admin/viewer. Admins may also set roles, but cannot promote to or change the owner.

post.description: Move the owner role to another existing member. The current owner becomes admin.

403.description: Only the owner can transfer ownership

404.description: New owner is not a member
